safest_next_operational_step: Keep fixed Enrollware classes live. Continue shadow/internal-preview dynamic runs, then add or confirm appointment containers until at least Brian + Shipyard produces URL-capable seeds before any public handoff.
minimum_go_live_checklist: Fixed Enrollware classes remain available until replacement dynamic seeds are verified.
Class Report ingestion is current and sessions_current.json is refreshed.
Dynamic offers account for current occupancy.
Confirmed active appointment container exists for each live instructor/location path.
Seed URL preview produces valid preview URLs for intended live seeds.
Worker click-time recheck exists and is enabled only behind approval.
Rollback can hide dynamic buttons and restore fixed-class-only schedule immediately.
risks_if_fixed_classes_deleted_too_early: Public schedule vacuum if dynamic seeds remain filtered to zero.
Customers cannot self-select dates if no confirmed-container-backed seed is public.
Unverified Amy/other-instructor availability could be exposed without appointment URL support.
Existing Enrollware occupancy could be lost as a blocking source if ingestion is not refreshed first.
Manual recovery load increases because customer-facing pages may show too few or no options.
